title: menispermum epibaterium
intro: Menispermum epibaterium, also known as the moonseed, is a plant species native to parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Menispermum epibaterium are thought to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, but I couldn't find any information on standard dosages or preparations.
